def solve(grid: list[list[int]], x: int, y: int, k: int) -> list[list[int]]:
    submatrix = [row[y:y + k] for row in grid[x:x + k]]

    val submatrix = grid[x.toInt() until x.toInt() + k.toInt()].map { row -> row.subArray(y.toInt(), y.toInt() + k.toInt()) }
    val reversedSubmatrix = submatrix.reversed()
    for (i in 0 until k.toInt()) {
        val originalRow = grid[x.toInt() + i]
        val newRow = reversedSubmatrix[i]
        val temp = originalRow.copyOf()
        for (j in 0 until k.toInt()) {
            temp[y.toInt() + j] = newRow[j]
        }
        grid[x.toInt() + i] = temp
    }
